name: GATA2-MECOM
model_result: CAPTURED (+0.093 der-WT; enhancer-specific; distance decay; DNase recognition)
coord_source: EVI1 TSS=Ensembl ENST00000264674; G2DHE=Groschel 2014 + MonoMAC -110 SNV (PMC10587712)
notes: The anchor positive control. NOT a fusion gene (no chimeric transcript).

name: TCR-TAL1
wetlab_status: associative (recurrent t(1;14); no CRISPR of TCR enhancer)
paper: Begley PNAS 1989; Chen EMBO J 1990; Eδ: Redondo Science 1990
model_result: PENDING RE-RUN (prior +0.116@5kb invalid: built on wrong enhancer Eα; rebuild with Eδ)
coord_source: TAL1 (a.k.a. SCL/TCL5) TSS=NCBI Gene 6886; Eδ=GenBank M33967/Redondo 1990 hg38 BLAT (Jδ3–Cδ intron; ENCODE pELS E1702206)
notes: Gene TAL1=SCL=TCL5. Hijacked element is Eδ (early/DN enhancer), NOT Eα (~93kb away, DP-stage). Mansour 2014 (PMID 25394790, MuTE) is a SEPARATE cis mechanism, not this control.

name: ETV6-MNX1
model_result: WEAK (+0.012 der-WT; only block-start window; null in K562)
coord_source: MNX1 TSS=Ensembl ENST00000252971; enhancer block hg19 chr12:11,951,022-12,164,578 -> hg38 (Naranjo 2024)
notes: 213 kb block; active ~1kb sub-element unresolved; HSPC-specific (must read in CD34).

name: MIPOL1-ETV1
cell_context: LNCaP prostate adenoca (ETV1-low in normal prostate)
model_result: PENDING (new control replacing LMO2; AlphaGenome primary — ~400kb distal; beyond Borzoi range)
notes: Genuine enhancer hijacking, NOT a fusion (paper: no ETV1 fusion/amplification in LNCaP). t(7;14) neo-loop brings chr14q13 (MIPOL1-intronic) enhancers to intact ETV1 (~400kb after SV; AlphaGenome primary). Replaces discredited LMO2 (neomorphic promoter, not hijacking).

name: BCL11B
wetlab_status: associative (HiChIP + allele-specific; CRISPR only for reverse TLX3 dir)
coord_source: BCL11B TSS=Ensembl ENST00000357195; BETA coords TBD (Montefiori suppl / EGA EGAS00001004810)
notes: Distal (>=300 kb), AlphaGenome edge. Botten Blood 2023 PMID 36947815 = CRISPRi for TLX3 not BCL11B.

name: IGF2
coord_source: IGF2 TSS=UCSC NM_000612; SE coords TBD from suppl
notes: IGF2 is IMPRINTED - confounds sequence-only model. Distance likely >524 kb (Borzoi out of range).

name: TERT
wetlab_status: none (correlative; CRISPR-SV paper validated MYC not TERT)
notes: Rejected. Also: breakpoint-TSS distance does not predict TERT level (Peifer).

name: GFI1B
model_result: rejected (no causal wet-lab; no MB RNA tracks)
notes: Rejected. No medulloblastoma RNA tracks in models.

name: EGFR-SEPT14
model_result: NULL (negative control: promoter donation only, no novel distal enhancer)
notes: THE negative control. Kinase fusion - oncogenic effect trans/protein, invisible to cis model.

name: TMPRSS2-ERG
model_result: promoter_donation (ablating donated promoter drops ERG ~69%; NOT distal enhancer capture)
coord_source: FusionGDB hg19; TMPRSS2 canonical TSS=Ensembl ENST00000332149 (chr21:41,508,158 hg38)
notes: Originally tried as positive control; reframed as promoter donation (the TSS-anchor-trap lesson).

name: PTPRZ1-MET
notes: Brain-active PTPRZ1 promoter drives MET = clean promoter-swap oncogene activation. Best clinical fusion to run first.

name: EGFR-VOPP1
notes: Table has EGFR-VOPP1; user asked VOPP1-EGFR (EGFR overexpression) - check orientation.
